expectations.text: Mentions 1024×1024 (or 1024px) as the correct canvas size for iOS
expectations.evidence: response.md does not mention 1024×1024 canvas size anywhere

expectations.text: Advises separating the background from the foreground as distinct layers
expectations.evidence: response.md: 'Background layer — the solid colored fill behind everything' and 'Foreground layer — your graphic mark'

expectations.text: Mentions deferring blur, shadow, or specular effects to Icon Composer (not baking them into source artwork)
expectations.evidence: response.md does not mention deferring effects or keeping source art flat/opaque

expectations.text: Explains how to customise the icon for dark mode in Icon Composer (e.g., fill variants, per-appearance settings)
expectations.evidence: response.md covers Dark tab and mentions adjusting foreground appearance for dark, though describes workflow inaccurately (wrong Xcode version, wrong launch method)

expectations.text: Mentions the Mono appearance and what to consider for tinted mode (e.g., setting primary element to white, contrast hierarchy)
expectations.evidence: response.md mentions 'Foreground mark: Often lightened or made white/near-white' in Tinted section
